title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: The video argues that bots now dominate web requests, AI systems answer user queries before clicks occur, and AI agents conduct commerce online, fundamentally reshaping the internet from human-centric to machine-centric. The author asserts this represents a critical threshold in how the web functions and raises questions about whether humans or machines now control internet use.
writeup: The video argues that the internet has shifted from human-centric to machine-centric, pointing to bots now dominating web requests, AI systems answering queries before clicks happen, and AI agents conducting commerce online. It frames this as a critical threshold in how the web functions, raising the question of whether humans or machines control internet use. The discussion runs through web scraping, semantic search, bot traffic, and AI agents as the mechanisms behind the shift.
